# Apology

*[Plato](../philosophers/plato.md) · 399 BCE · *Ἀπολογία Σωκράτους**

The defence speech Socrates delivers at his trial for impiety and corrupting the youth; he vindicates self-examination as a mission received from the god and a service to the city, and faces death without fear.
